enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the joy and excitement of being in love, highlighting the carefree nature of romance.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Naanum Rowdydhaan, this song captures a pivotal moment of romance, showcasing the lead characters' chemistry and playful interactions.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features vocals by Sid Sriram and is composed by Anirudh, with lyrics penned by Vignesh Shivan.

When was this song released?

Yennai Maatrum Kadhale was released on October 2, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yennai Maatrum Kadhale, the song beautifully encapsulates the exuberance of young love, set against the backdrop of the film Naanum Rowdydhaan. The lyrics convey a sense of carefree romance, emphasizing the joy and thrill of being in love. With Anirudh's catchy composition and Sid Sriram's melodious voice, the song evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. It’s a perfect anthem for romantic occasions, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yennai Maatrum Kadhale from Naanum Rowdydhaan is a vibrant celebration of love, showcasing the unique collaboration of Anirudh's catchy music and Sid Sriram's soulful vocals. This song perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance and the joy of being in love. With its upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics, it’s a must-listen for anyone looking to elevate their mood!
stanzaMeanings: Whatever comes to me, whether I lose something or fall down, even if I run away, your thoughts are enough for me to stand strong.
That love is a deceptive trap, no one can escape from it. Living without it is not needed, not needed, not needed.
That love is a deceptive trap, even tears cannot express it. Living without it is not needed, not needed, not needed.
Only love for me, only love for you, everything is just love, love.
Only love for me, only love for you, everything is just love, love.
Only love for me, only love for you, everything is just love, love.

No knife, no blood, just a rowdy. It's time to love, just a rowdy. Don't say to cut it off, just a rowdy. A pure heart belongs to a good rowdy. No knife, no blood, just a rowdy. It's time to love, just a rowdy. Don't say to cut it off, just a rowdy. A pure heart belongs to a good rowdy.
